calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Aug-02-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Bressler and Faye Bressler for and with Qi Pan.

Mr. Bressler stated that there were no objections. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
